name: Burlington Pickleball Complex
description: Burlington Pickleball Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Burlington, NC. There are 16 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Eli Whitney Community Center
description: Eli Whitney Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Graham, NC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Pickleball is typically held Monday and Thursday evenings from 5:30pm until 7:30pm in the Eli Whitney Gym. Please refer to the monthly calendar (on website) for the current schedule.

name: Fairchild Community Center
description: Fairchild Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Burlington, NC. There are 7 hard courts. 3 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Graham Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Graham Recreation Center in Graham, NC! There is 1 indoor wood court. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. You can’t reserve the court. The court is free.

name: Joe C Davidson Park
description: Joe C Davidson Park is a place to play pickleball in Burlington, NC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Lamb's Chapel
description: Come play pickleball at Lamb's Chapel in Burlington, NC! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Players have access to lights.

name: Mackintosh on The Lake Pickleball Court
description: Mackintosh on The Lake Pickleball Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Burlington, NC. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Mebane Arts & Community Center
description: The two gymnasiums with a divider between the courts provides for 4 pickelball courts.  The surface is a vinyl floor, so there are a few dead spots throughout the surface.  There is no membership required, but registration and a signed waiver is required.  Sign in on a computer each time you play.  There is no fee to play.  Open play for all skill levels is currently scheduled for Tuesdays and Thursdays from 1:30 pm to 3:30 pm.  Occassionally other activities such as basketball or volleyball games may use one gym, reducing the courts available from 4 to 2.
fees: Members only — No fees to play

name: Mebane Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Mebane Tennis Courts in Mebane, NC! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Olde Forest Racquet Club
description: Olde Forest Racquet Club is a place to play pickleball in Elon, NC. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and trainers or lessons.
